results.name: breaching
results.description: Large marine animals or vehicles rising up out of the water.

results.name: breaker bay
results.description: A harbor city featured in Odyssey.

results.name: breaks-ktk-morph-rule
results.description: Cards with morph (or a similar ability) which break the Khans of Tarkir block development rule which stated that a morphed creature cannot be turned face-up for less than five mana if doing so would allow it to win combat against a face-down morphed creature.

results.name: breastplate
results.description: The chestpiece in a suit of armor. Not to be confused with [boob plate](boob-plate).

results.name: bretagard
results.description: One of the ten realms of Kaldheim, land of humans.

results.name: bribery
results.description: Give an opponent something in exchange for a benefit to you.

results.name: bring your own crew
results.description: A vehicle that comes with a built-in pilot to crew it.

results.name: brotherhood (ffx sword)
results.description: Tidus' iconic blue sword from FFX
